languages.text: "Второй Нунциус — {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} экстремис Адептус Механикус. Дражайший коллега, который мог совладать с моим характером, шагая плечом к плечу по пути Познания. Единственный человек, рядом с которым я чувствовал себя живым. Последние полвека он находится в непрерывной агонии между жизнью и смертью на секретном объекте Амсанкт. По моей вине. Все это время я ищу способы его спасти. Он существует и все еще жив, это еще один..." {n}Заминка. Крохотный момент, вмещающий в себя страх и надежду — сомнения тяжелее целого мира. Эоганн тихо заканчивает:{/n} "Это факт".

traits.locale_text: "Второй Нунциус — {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} экстремис Адептус Механикус. Дражайший коллега, который мог совладать с моим характером, шагая плечом к плечу по пути Познания. Единственный человек, рядом с которым я чувствовал себя живым. Последние полвека он находится в непрерывной агонии между жизнью и смертью на секретном объекте Амсанкт. По моей вине. Все это время я ищу способы его спасти. Он существует и все еще жив, это еще один..." {n}Заминка. Крохотный момент, вмещающий в себя страх и надежду — сомнения тяжелее целого мира. Эоганн тихо заканчивает:{/n} "Это факт".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. My dearest colleague, the person who could cope with my temperament, walking shoulder to shoulder with me on the path of Knowledge. The only person whose presence ever made me feel alive. For the last half century, he has been in unending agony, caught between life and death, at the secret site Amsanct. Because of me. All this time, I have been searching for ways to save him. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."
languages.original_text: "Второй Нунциус — {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} экстремис Адептус Механикус. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."

He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."

languages.text: «El segundo Nuncius es un {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis del Adeptus Mechanicus. Mi querido colega, capaz de soportar mi temperamento, acompañándome por la senda del conocimiento. La única persona cuya presencia me ha hecho sentirme vivo. Durante el último siglo, se ha debatido agónico entre la vida y la muerte en la instalación secreta de Amsanct. Por mi culpa. Todo este tiempo he estado buscando formas de salvarle. Sigue existiendo y sigue vivo. Eso es otro he...». {n}Titubea. Por un momento, muestra miedo, esperanza, y una duda más pesada que cualquier planeta. Con voz queda, Eogunn termina:{/n} «Es un hecho».
languages.original_text: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. My dearest colleague, the person who could cope with my temperament, walking shoulder to shoulder with me on the path of Knowledge. The only person whose presence ever made me feel alive. Sigue existiendo y sigue vivo. Eso es otro he...». {n}Titubea. Por un momento, muestra miedo, esperanza, y una duda más pesada que cualquier planeta. Con voz queda, Eogunn termina:{/n} «Es un hecho».

languages.text: “第二个努恩修斯是机械修会的一名特级{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}，我最亲爱的同僚。他是唯一能包容我的脾气，在求知之路上与我并肩同行的人，也是唯一能让我感觉自己还活着的人。过去半个世纪，他一直在阿姆桑克特的秘密站点里承受着无尽的痛苦，求生不得，求死不能，全是因为我。一直以来，我都在寻找救他的办法。他存在，而且还活着，这是另一个……”{n}他犹豫了。恐惧与希望交织在这一瞬——这疑虑比整个世界都要沉重。伊奥贡低声说完：{/n}“这是事实。”
languages.original_text: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. My dearest colleague, the person who could cope with my temperament, walking shoulder to shoulder with me on the path of Knowledge. The only person whose presence ever made me feel alive. For the last half century, he has been in unending agony, caught between life and death, at the secret site Amsanct. Because of me. All this time, I have been searching for ways to save him. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."

traits.locale_text: “第二个努恩修斯是机械修会的一名特级{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}，我最亲爱的同僚。他是唯一能包容我的脾气，在求知之路上与我并肩同行的人，也是唯一能让我感觉自己还活着的人。过去半个世纪，他一直在阿姆桑克特的秘密站点里承受着无尽的痛苦，求生不得，求死不能，全是因为我。一直以来，我都在寻找救他的办法。他存在，而且还活着，这是另一个……”{n}他犹豫了。恐惧与希望交织在这一瞬——这疑虑比整个世界都要沉重。伊奥贡低声说完：{/n}“这是事实。”

languages.text: « Le second Nuncius est un {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} extremis de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Mon très cher collègue, qui marchait à mes côtés sur la voie de la connaissance malgré mon tempérament insupportable. La seule personne en compagnie de laquelle je me sentais vraiment vivant. Depuis cinquante ans, il endure un supplice sans fin, piégé entre la vie et la mort dans le site secret d'Amsanct. Par ma faute. Pendant tout ce temps, j'ai cherché un moyen de le sauver. Il existe et il est toujours en vie, c'est aussi... » {n}Eogunn hésite, l'espace d'un bref instant qui exprime autant de crainte que d'espoir, des doutes plus lourds qu'un monde entier. Il termine son explication à voix basse :{/n} « C'est un fait. »
languages.original_text: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. Il existe et il est toujours en vie, c'est aussi... » {n}Eogunn hésite, l'espace d'un bref instant qui exprime autant de crainte que d'espoir, des doutes plus lourds qu'un monde entier. Il termine son explication à voix basse :{/n} « C'est un fait. »

languages.text: "İkinci Nuncius, Adeptus Mechanicus mensubu bir {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} Extremis. Pek sevgili meslektaşım; mizacımla başa çıkabilen, Bilgi yolunda benimle omuz omuza yürüyen kişi. Varlığı bana yaşadığımı hissettiren tek kişi. Son yarım yüzyılda gizli Amsanct bölgesinde ölümle yaşam arasında sıkışmış, bitmek bilmeyen bir ızdırap içinde. Benim yüzümden hem de. Bunca zamandır onu kurtarmanın yollarını arıyordum. O hâlâ hayatta, bu da bir başka..." {n}Tereddüt. Korku ve umudu barındıran küçücük bir an... Koca bir dünyadan daha ağır şüpheler. Eogunn sessizce bitiriyor sözünü tamamlıyor.{/n} "Gerçek."
languages.original_text: "The second Nuncius is a {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis of the Adeptus Mechanicus. My dearest colleague, the person who could cope with my temperament, walking shoulder to shoulder with me on the path of Knowledge. The only person whose presence ever made me feel alive. For the last half century, he has been in unending agony, caught between life and death, at the secret site Amsanct. Because of me. All this time, I have been searching for ways to save him. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."

Son yarım yüzyılda gizli Amsanct bölgesinde ölümle yaşam arasında sıkışmış, bitmek bilmeyen bir ızdırap içinde. Benim yüzümden hem de. Bunca zamandır onu kurtarmanın yollarını arıyordum. O hâlâ hayatta, bu da bir başka..." {n}Tereddüt. Korku ve umudu barındıran küçücük bir an... Koca bir dünyadan daha ağır şüpheler. Eogunn sessizce bitiriyor sözünü tamamlıyor.{/n} "Gerçek."

languages.text: "Der zweite Nuncius ist ein {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Extremis des Adeptus Mechanicus. Mein geschätzter Kollege, die Person, die mit meinem Temperament umzugehen wusste, mit der ich Schulter an Schulter den Weg des Wissens beschritten habe. Die einzige Person, in dessen Gegenwart ich mich jemals lebendig fühlte. Seit einem halben Jahrhundert erleidet sie Höllenqualen, gefangen zwischen Leben und Tod, an dem geheimen Ort auf Amsanct. Wegen mir. All die Zeit habe ich nach Wegen gesucht, ihn zu retten. Er existiert und lebt noch, das ist eine andere ..." {n}Zögern. Ein winziger Moment voller Furcht und Hoffnung ... Zweifel, die schwerer wiegen als eine ganze Welt. Eogunn führt seinen Satz rasch zu Ende.{/n} "Das ist eine Tatsache."

languages.text: 「二人目のヌンキウスは、アデプトゥス・メカニクスの{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}ジェネター{/g}・エクストレミスだ。私の最愛の同僚であり、私の気質に付き合える者、知識の道を肩を並べて歩んでくれた者。その存在だけが、かつて私に生きている実感を与えてくれた。この半世紀の間、彼はアムサンクトの秘密の地で、生と死の狭間に囚われ、終わりなき苦悶の中にある。私のせいだ。私はずっと、彼を救う方法を探し続けてきた。彼は存在し、今なお生きている。これもまた…」{n}ためらい。恐怖と希望をたたえた、ほんの一瞬――全世界よりも重い疑念。エオガンは静かに言い終える。{/n}「事実だ。」

For the last half century, he has been in unending agony, caught between life and death, at the secret site Amsanct. Because of me. All this time, I have been searching for ways to save him. He exists and is still alive, this is another..." {n}Hesitation. A tiny moment that holds fear and hope — doubts heavier than an entire world. Eogunn finishes quietly,{/n} "It's a fact."
